title: paraprasophyllum murfetii
side_effects: Paraprasophyllum murfetii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in individuals with sensitivities. If ingested, it can cause gastrointestinal problems like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use of Paraprasophyllum murfetii can lead to convulsions, coma, and even death due to the toxic compounds present in the plant. It is essential to exercise caution and consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health benefits.
